title: byrsella civilis
side_effects: Byrsella civilis can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, which can lead to dehydration and electrolyte imbalances in the body. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant can also cause liver and kidney damage, as well as increase the risk of bleeding and bruising. Additionally, individuals with certain pre-existing medical conditions, such as high blood pressure or diabetes, may experience adverse reactions, including rapid heartbeat, dizziness, and changes in blood sugar levels. In severe cases, improper use of byrsella civilis can even lead to coma or death.
